---
description: "Use when editing localized routes, next-intl setup, message catalogs, or locale-switching behavior in AdvPort. Covers localePrefix routing, message-shape sync, and hash/query preservation."
applyTo:
  [
    "src/app/[locale]/**",
    "src/i18n/**",
    "messages/**/*.json",
    "src/components/LanguageSwitcher*.ts*",
  ]
---

# AdvPort i18n Guidance

- Locale-prefixed routes are mandatory because `src/i18n/routing.ts` uses `localePrefix: \"always\"`.
- `src/app/[locale]/layout.tsx` should validate awaited locale params, call `setRequestLocale(locale)`, and export `generateStaticParams()`.
- Keep `messages/en.json`, `messages/nl.json`, and `messages/ka.json` structurally synchronized.
- Preserve query-string and hash-fragment behavior in locale switching.
- `src/components/LanguageSwitcher.tsx` and `src/components/LanguageSwitcherUtils.ts` are the canonical implementations.
- Use `tests/translations-sync.test.ts` as the validation reference when message catalogs change.
- Read `docs/ai/translations-and-routing.md` before non-trivial i18n changes.
